mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.is_replied = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE is_replied = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, author_name, author_email, content, ip_address, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{content}, #{ipAddress}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, content = #{content}, reply_content = #{replyContent}, status = #{status}, is_replied = #{isReplied} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, is_replied = 1, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
